title: Publish hosted-pack starter templates
summary: Adds governed starter templates and guidance for new hosted packs.
scope_items: Create starter templates for pack manifests, pack-owned Python roots, and namespace command docs.
Update template inventory and pack authoring guidance to point at the starter set.
done_when_items: A new hosted pack can be scaffolded from governed templates without reverse-engineering an existing pack.
Templates and guidance identify the minimum portable pack file set.
